en.title: Blog/Deep-Sleep-Vs-Rem - SleepAnalytics - Train Hard. Recover Smarter.
en.description: The only app that automatically connects your workouts to your recovery. Apple Watch + Garmin. Clinical sleep science. Transparent scores. Privacy-first.
en.content: Deep Sleep vs. REM: Which Matters More for Recovery? Both stages are essential. But for different things — and knowing which one you're missing changes your response. When people say "I need more deep sleep," they often mean "I don't feel recovered." But deep sleep and REM do different jobs — and your recovery depends on getting the right amounts of both. What Deep Sleep (N3) Does Also called slow-wave sleep (SWS), deep sleep is characterized by high-amplitude, low-frequency delta waves. It's wh

en.title: Blog/Exercise-And-Sleep - SleepAnalytics - Train Hard. Recover Smarter.
en.description: The only app that automatically connects your workouts to your recovery. Apple Watch + Garmin. Clinical sleep science. Transparent scores. Privacy-first.
en.content: Does Evening Exercise Hurt Your Sleep? What Your Own Data Says The research is mixed at the population level. Here's why your personal data matters more than averages. Conventional advice says "don't exercise within 3 hours of bedtime." But fitness data tells a more nuanced story — and your personal patterns may not match the population average at all. What Research Actually Shows A 2019 meta-analysis in Sports Medicine (Stutz et al.) analyzed 23 studies on evening exercise and sleep. The conclu

en.title: Blog/Garmin-Apple-Health-Sleep - SleepAnalytics - Train Hard. Recover Smarter.
en.description: The only app that automatically connects your workouts to your recovery. Apple Watch + Garmin. Clinical sleep science. Transparent scores. Privacy-first.
en.content: Garmin and Sleep Analytics on iPhone: Getting the Most From Apple Health Sync Step-by-step guide for Garmin users — what data syncs, what doesn't, and how to maximize SleepAnalytics with your watch. Garmin makes excellent wearables. Apple Health makes excellent data infrastructure. SleepAnalytics bridges them — but you need to know how the sync works to get the most out of it. How Garmin Syncs to Apple Health Garmin Connect for iPhone can sync sleep and activity data to Apple Health. You enable

en.title: Blog/Hrv-During-Sleep - SleepAnalytics - Train Hard. Recover Smarter.
en.description: The only app that automatically connects your workouts to your recovery. Apple Watch + Garmin. Clinical sleep science. Transparent scores. Privacy-first.
en.content: HRV During Sleep: Reading Your Autonomic Recovery How heart rate variability changes across sleep stages — and what low overnight HRV actually means. Heart Rate Variability during sleep is one of the most sensitive physiological markers of recovery — and often the first signal that something is off, before you consciously feel it. HRV Basics HRV is the variation in time between consecutive heartbeats. Counterintuitively, more variation is better — it indicates a healthy, responsive autonomic ner

en.title: Blog/Sleep-Cycles-90-Minutes - SleepAnalytics - Train Hard. Recover Smarter.
en.description: The only app that automatically connects your workouts to your recovery. Apple Watch + Garmin. Clinical sleep science. Transparent scores. Privacy-first.
en.content: The 90-Minute Sleep Cycle: How to Wake Up Feeling Rested Why waking mid-cycle feels terrible — even after 8 hours — and how understanding cycles helps you rest smarter. You slept 8 hours but woke up feeling like you hadn't slept at all. Then on another day you slept 6 hours and felt surprisingly sharp. What's going on? The Ultradian Rhythm Beyond the 24-hour circadian rhythm, there's a shorter oscillation at work during sleep: the ultradian rhythm. Every ~90 minutes, your brain cycles through a

en.title: Blog/Sleep-Debt-Calculator - SleepAnalytics - Train Hard. Recover Smarter.
en.description: The only app that automatically connects your workouts to your recovery. Apple Watch + Garmin. Clinical sleep science. Transparent scores. Privacy-first.
en.content: Sleep Debt: How It Builds, What It Costs, and How to Pay It Back The science of sleep deprivation accumulation and evidence-based recovery strategies. Sleep debt is the accumulated shortfall between the sleep you need and the sleep you get. Unlike financial debt, it doesn't appear immediately on a balance sheet — but the cognitive and physiological costs compound in ways that are measurable and significant. How Sleep Debt Builds Van Dongen et al. (Sleep, 2003) conducted one of the most important

en.title: Blog/Sleep-Efficiency-Guide - SleepAnalytics - Train Hard. Recover Smarter.
en.description: The only app that automatically connects your workouts to your recovery. Apple Watch + Garmin. Clinical sleep science. Transparent scores. Privacy-first.
en.content: Sleep Efficiency: Why 85% Is the Magic Number The clinical definition of sleep efficiency, why it matters, and practical strategies to improve yours. Sleep Efficiency (SE) is the ratio of time you actually slept to the time you spent in bed. A seemingly simple number with surprisingly deep clinical implications. The Formula Sleep Efficiency = (Total Sleep Time ÷ Time in Bed) × 100 If you got into bed at 10:30pm, fell asleep at 11pm, woke briefly at 3am for 10 minutes, and woke up at 6:30am — you

en.title: Blog/Sleep-Regularity-Index - SleepAnalytics - Train Hard. Recover Smarter.
en.description: The only app that automatically connects your workouts to your recovery. Apple Watch + Garmin. Clinical sleep science. Transparent scores. Privacy-first.
en.content: The Sleep Regularity Index: Why Consistency Beats Duration A deep dive into the SRI metric — what it measures, what the research says, and how to improve yours. You slept 8 hours last night. But did you sleep at the same time as the night before? The Sleep Regularity Index says that when you sleep may matter as much as how long . What Is the SRI? The Sleep Regularity Index was developed by Andrew Phillips at Harvard (2017). It measures the day-to-day consistency of your sleep-wake timing by calc

en.title: Blog/Sleep-Score-Explained - SleepAnalytics - Train Hard. Recover Smarter.
en.description: The only app that automatically connects your workouts to your recovery. Apple Watch + Garmin. Clinical sleep science. Transparent scores. Privacy-first.
en.content: Understanding Your Sleep Score: What Every Number Means A complete guide to the 8 components that make up your SleepAnalytics score — and what they reveal. Your Sleep Score is a number between 0 and 100. But what does it actually mean — and why did it drop from 84 to 71 overnight when you felt like you slept fine? This guide explains all 8 components of the SleepAnalytics sleep score in plain language, with clinical context for each one. Why a Score at All? A single number is useful for tracking

en.title: Blog/Social-Jet-Lag - SleepAnalytics - Train Hard. Recover Smarter.
en.description: The only app that automatically connects your workouts to your recovery. Apple Watch + Garmin. Clinical sleep science. Transparent scores. Privacy-first.
en.content: Social Jet Lag: Why Your Weekend Sleep Pattern Is Hurting Your Week The chronobiology of inconsistent sleep timing — and what it costs you. You sleep at midnight on weekdays and 3am on weekends. That 3-hour shift is equivalent to flying across 3 time zones every Friday night — and flying back every Monday morning. Without leaving your bedroom. What Is Social Jet Lag? Social Jet Lag (SJL), coined by chronobiologist Till Roenneberg in 2006, is the discrepancy between your social sleep schedule (wo

en.description: The only app that automatically connects your workouts to your recovery. Apple Watch + Garmin. Clinical sleep science. Transparent scores. Privacy-first.
en.content: Wrist Temperature and Your Circadian Rhythm (Apple Watch Series 8+) How skin temperature drives sleep onset and what Apple Watch Series 8 measures each night. Hardware requirement: Wrist temperature data is only available on Apple Watch Series 8, Ultra (all generations), and SE (3rd generation) or later. en.description: The sleep science behind SleepAnalytics. How Apple Watch detects sleep stages, what AASM standards mean, and how our sleep score is calculated.

            science, the formulas, and the limitations — transparently. Why Sleep Quality Matters Beyond Duration 7 hours of fragmented sleep is not the same as 7 hours of restorative sleep. The American Academy of Sleep Medicine (AASM) defines sleep quality through multiple
